# 'gs log' shows PR draft and review status alongside the CR ID
# when --cr-status is enabled.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2026-03-10T12:00:00Z'

mkdir repo
cd repo
git init
git commit --allow-empty -m 'Initial commit'
gs repo init

# set up a fake remote
shamhub init
shamhub register alice
shamhub new origin alice/example.git
git push origin main
env SHAMHUB_USERNAME=alice
gs auth login

# create stack feat1 -> feat2 -> feat3
git add feat1.txt
gs bc feat1 -m 'feat1'
git add feat2.txt
gs bc feat2 -m 'feat2'
git add feat3.txt
gs bc feat3 -m 'feat3'

# submit all three
gs bco feat3
gs dss --fill

# server-side: mark feat1 as draft,
# request review on feat2,
# approve feat3.
shamhub draft alice/example 1
shamhub review alice/example 2 alice
shamhub approve alice/example 3 alice

# Test: no cr-status — no draft/review info shown
gs ls
cmp stderr $WORK/golden/ls-without-status.txt
gs ll
cmp stderr $WORK/golden/ll-without-status.txt

# Test: with --cr-status flag
gs ls -S
cmp stderr $WORK/golden/ls-with-status.txt
gs ll -S
cmp stderr $WORK/golden/ll-with-status.txt

# Test: with config option
git config spice.log.crStatus true
gs ls
cmp stderr $WORK/golden/ls-with-status.txt
gs ll
cmp stderr $WORK/golden/ll-with-status.txt

# Test: JSON output
gs ls --json --no-cr-status
cmpenv stdout $WORK/golden/ls-without-status.json
gs ll --json --no-cr-status
cmpenv stdout $WORK/golden/ll-without-status.json
gs ls --json
cmpenv stdout $WORK/golden/ls-with-status.json
gs ll --json
cmpenv stdout $WORK/golden/ll-with-status.json

-- repo/feat1.txt --
feat1
-- repo/feat2.txt --
feat2
-- repo/feat3.txt --
feat3

-- golden/ls-without-status.txt --
    ┏━■ feat3 (#3) ◀
  ┏━┻□ feat2 (#2)
┏━┻□ feat1 (#1)
main
-- golden/ll-without-status.txt --
    ┏━■ feat3 (#3) ◀
    ┃   d714561 feat3 (now)
  ┏━┻□ feat2 (#2)
  ┃    bec278e feat2 (now)
┏━┻□ feat1 (#1)
┃    4085b4c feat1 (now)
main
-- golden/ls-with-status.txt --
    ┏━■ feat3 (#3 open approved) ◀
  ┏━┻□ feat2 (#2 open review requested)
┏━┻□ feat1 (#1 open draft)
main
-- golden/ll-with-status.txt --
    ┏━■ feat3 (#3 open approved) ◀
    ┃   d714561 feat3 (now)
  ┏━┻□ feat2 (#2 open review requested)
  ┃    bec278e feat2 (now)
┏━┻□ feat1 (#1 open draft)
┃    4085b4c feat1 (now)
main
-- golden/ls-without-status.json --
{"name":"feat1","down":{"name":"main"},"ups":[{"name":"feat2"}],"change":{"id":"#1","url":"$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/changes/1"},"push":{"ahead":0,"behind":0}}
{"name":"feat2","down":{"name":"feat1"},"ups":[{"name":"feat3"}],"change":{"id":"#2","url":"$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/changes/2"},"push":{"ahead":0,"behind":0}}
{"name":"feat3","current":true,"down":{"name":"feat2"},"change":{"id":"#3","url":"$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/changes/3"},"push":{"ahead":0,"behind":0}}
{"name":"main","ups":[{"name":"feat1"}]}
-- golden/ll-without-status.json --
{"name":"feat1","down":{"name":"main"},"ups":[{"name":"feat2"}],"commits":[{"sha":"4085b4c6f503696df97f2e18fe91f177b1d3dab1","subject":"feat1"}],"change":{"id":"#1","url":"$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/changes/1"},"push":{"ahead":0,"behind":0}}
{"name":"feat2","down":{"name":"feat1"},"ups":[{"name":"feat3"}],"commits":[{"sha":"bec278e2e0436322b810091e1ddd3991cc741bbe","subject":"feat2"}],"change":{"id":"#2","url":"$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/changes/2"},"push":{"ahead":0,"behind":0}}
{"name":"feat3","current":true,"down":{"name":"feat2"},"commits":[{"sha":"d714561d41a6715316a33c310e172972c2caab37","subject":"feat3"}],"change":{"id":"#3","url":"$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/changes/3"},"push":{"ahead":0,"behind":0}}
{"name":"main","ups":[{"name":"feat1"}]}
-- golden/ls-with-status.json --
{"name":"feat1","down":{"name":"main"},"ups":[{"name":"feat2"}],"change":{"id":"#1","url":"$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/changes/1","status":"open","draft":true},"push":{"ahead":0,"behind":0}}
{"name":"feat2","down":{"name":"feat1"},"ups":[{"name":"feat3"}],"change":{"id":"#2","url":"$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/changes/2","status":"open","reviewDecision":"review_requested"},"push":{"ahead":0,"behind":0}}
{"name":"feat3","current":true,"down":{"name":"feat2"},"change":{"id":"#3","url":"$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/changes/3","status":"open","reviewDecision":"approved"},"push":{"ahead":0,"behind":0}}
{"name":"main","ups":[{"name":"feat1"}]}
-- golden/ll-with-status.json --
{"name":"feat1","down":{"name":"main"},"ups":[{"name":"feat2"}],"commits":[{"sha":"4085b4c6f503696df97f2e18fe91f177b1d3dab1","subject":"feat1"}],"change":{"id":"#1","url":"$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/changes/1","status":"open","draft":true},"push":{"ahead":0,"behind":0}}
{"name":"feat2","down":{"name":"feat1"},"ups":[{"name":"feat3"}],"commits":[{"sha":"bec278e2e0436322b810091e1ddd3991cc741bbe","subject":"feat2"}],"change":{"id":"#2","url":"$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/changes/2","status":"open","reviewDecision":"review_requested"},"push":{"ahead":0,"behind":0}}
{"name":"feat3","current":true,"down":{"name":"feat2"},"commits":[{"sha":"d714561d41a6715316a33c310e172972c2caab37","subject":"feat3"}],"change":{"id":"#3","url":"$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/changes/3","status":"open","reviewDecision":"approved"},"push":{"ahead":0,"behind":0}}
{"name":"main","ups":[{"name":"feat1"}]}
